heading: Yathella vs Yatte Yattah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yathella, New South Wales and Yatte Yattah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yathella has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Yatte Yattah (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yathella or Yatte Yattah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yathella has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Yatte Yattah scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yathella scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Yatte Yattah scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yathella or Yatte Yattah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yathella has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
